dj_text: Avicii - Hey Brother [Bardcore / Medieval Style Instrumental Cover] was great. But have you considered Sherry - The Four Seasons [Bardcore | Medieval version]? You should. You're about to. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: Are you seeking eternal nights and mysterious melodies with a sprinkle of suspense?
hijack_text: ✨ Good morning, this is Jazz Cosmic Wave from Dimension K-7!
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
